name: v1.41.0
body:
## What's Changed
* docs: audit and update docs/ for v1.40.0 release by @trek-e in https://github.com/gsd-build/get-shit-done/pull/3048
* refactor(sdk): extract GSDTools transport seam + policy by @trek-e in https://github.com/gsd-build/get-shit-done/pull/3058
* refactor(query): extract command catalog seam for registry wiring by @trek-e in https://github.com/gsd-build/get-shit-done/pull/3060
* refactor(query): deepen dispatch policy seam with structured result contract by @trek-e in https://github.com/gsd-build/get-shit-done/pull/3066
* docs(contributing): codify CONTEXT + ADR contribution and testing standards by @trek-e in https://github.com/gsd-build/get-shit-done/pull/3071
* refactor(query): deepen command definition seam and clean fallback mapping by @trek-e in https://github.com/gsd-build/get-shit-done/pull/3069
* refactor(cli): extract Query CLI Adapter Module seam by @trek-e in https://github.com/gsd-build/get-shit-done/pull/3074
* refactor(query): deepen runtime context/native adapter/output seams by @trek-e in https://github.com/gsd-build/get-shit-done/pull/3076
* Deepen query dispatch seam with Command Topology Module by @trek-e in https://github.com/gsd-build/get-shit-done/pull/3078
* refactor: deepen GSDTools query execution seams by @trek-e in https://github.com/gsd-build/get-shit-done/pull/3085
* refactor: deepen query architecture seams with compatibility shims by @trek-e in https://github.com/gsd-build/get-shit-done/pull/3108
* fix: respect explicit milestone version in milestone complete by @trek-e in https://github.com/gsd-build/get-shit-done/pull/3109
* fix: normalize stale STATE narrative tails on milestone completion by @trek-e in https://github.com/gsd-build/get-shit-done/pull/3122
* fix: guard optional sketch-findings probes from non-zero ls exits by @trek-e in https://github.com/gsd-build/get-shit-done/pull/3119
* fix: make orphaned worktree prune non-destructive by default by @trek-e in https://github.com/gsd-build/get-shit-done/pull/3117
* fix: remove stale /gsd-list-phase-assumptions guidance from progress routing by @trek-e in https://github.com/gsd-build/get-shit-done/pull/3111
* fix: align SDK install/fallback guidance with query-capable CLI by @trek-e in https://github.com/gsd-build/get-shit-done/pull/3123
* fix: prevent state complete-phase from resolving literal 'Phase' token by @trek-e in https://github.com/gsd-build/get-shit-done/pull/3118
* fix: normalize legacy top-level branching_strategy into git config by @trek-e in https://github.com/gsd-build/get-shit-done/pull/3116
* fix: remove /clear then from resume route templates by @trek-e in https://github.com/gsd-build/get-shit-done/pull/3113
* fix: make update custom-file backup resilient to EACCES by @trek-e in https://github.com/gsd-build/get-shit-done/pull/3124
* fix: count nested plans/ layout in phase status indexing by @trek-e in https://github.com/gsd-build/get-shit-done/pull/3115
* fix: remove stale /gsd-next references from user-facing surfaces by @trek-e in https://github.com/gsd-build/get-shit-done/pull/3114
* fix: canonicalize plan-summary matching for suffixless summaries by @trek-e in https://github.com/gsd-build/get-shit-done/pull/3112
* fix: make phase insert placeholder/dry-run preconditions explicit by @trek-e in https://github.com/gsd-build/get-shit-done/pull/3125
* fix(#3131): re-wire 4 orphaned workflows as flags on parent commands by @trek-e in https://github.com/gsd-build/get-shit-done/pull/3133
* docs(#3148): rewrite root README — storyline + highlights only, link to docs for detail by @trek-e in https://github.com/gsd-build/get-shit-done/pull/3149
* fix(#3130): harden update.md npx invocations against cache-stale and token-routing failures by @trek-e in https://github.com/gsd-build/get-shit-done/pull/3136
* fix(#3087): restore 10 demoted directive phrases in gsd-planner.md by @trek-e in https://github.com/gsd-build/get-shit-done/pull/3138
* fix(#3128): extend roadmap.cjs plan-count to detect {N}-PLAN-{NN}-{slug}.md layout by @trek-e in https://github.com/gsd-build/get-shit-done/pull/3139
* fix(#3126): replace hardcoded globalSkillsBase with first-class runtime-aware mapping by @trek-e in https://github.com/gsd-build/get-shit-done/pull/3140
* fix(#3129): replace bypassed bash regex with token-walk git-cmd.js classifier by @trek-e in https://github.com/gsd-build/get-shit-done/pull/3141
* fix(#3120): add register_authored_at_plan_time guard — prevent rubber-stamping legacy phases by @trek-e in https://github.com/gsd-build/get-shit-done/pull/3142
* fix(#3096): enforce sequential Steps 7+8 + Edit-only tool discipline in ai-integration-phase by @trek-e in https://github.com/gsd-build/get-shit-done/pull/3143
* fix(#3097, #3099): add cwd-drift sentinel + absolute-path guard to executor worktree protocol by @trek-e in https://github.com/gsd-build/get-shit-done/pull/3144
* fix(#3127): make state.begin-phase idempotent on mid-flight phases by @trek-e in https://github.com/gsd-build/get-shit-done/pull/3145
* fix(#3121): implement commands verb in SDK native registry by @trek-e in https://github.com/gsd-build/get-shit-done/pull/3146
* fix(#3135): restore workflows/add-backlog.md — capture --backlog had no workflow to load by @trek-e in https://github.com/gsd-build/get-shit-done/pull/3147
* fix(statusline): accept numeric 100 and block-list next_phases parsing by @trek-e in https://github.com/gsd-build/get-shit-done/pull/3154
* enh(#3151): command contract validation module + prose @-ref cleanup + workflow extraction (ADR-0002) by @trek-e in https://github.com/gsd-build/get-shit-done/pull/3152
* test(stats): lock decimal phase continuity when .10 exists by @trek-e in https://github.com/gsd-build/get-shit-done/pull/3155
* feat(sdk): deepen runtime bridge seam for native-first SDK dispatch by @trek-e in https://github.com/gsd-build/get-shit-done/pull/3158
* fix(graphify): run /gsd-graphify build inline (with regression fence) by @trek-e in https://github.com/gsd-build/get-shit-done/pull/3169
* feat(graphify): commit-based staleness from built_at_commit (#3170) by @trek-e in https://github.com/gsd-build/get-shit-done/pull/3171
* docs: add Prerelease editions install guidance (Next/Nightly/Insiders/Preview) by @trek-e in https://github.com/gsd-build/get-shit-done/pull/3173
* fix(config): add resolve_model_ids to VALID_CONFIG_KEYS; accept workflow._auto_chain_active via RUNTIME_STATE_KEYS by @trek-e in https://github.com/gsd-build/get-shit-done/pull/3188
* fix(gsd-tools): support .planning/milestones/v*-phases/ layout (#3164) by @trek-e in https://github.com/gsd-build/get-shit-done/pull/3191
* fix(hooks): use #!/usr/bin/env bash in community .sh hooks for portability (#3104) by @trek-e in https://github.com/gsd-build/get-shit-done/pull/3194
* fix(dispatcher): rename Task→Agent in allowed-tools, workflow prose, and agent tools frontmatter by @trek-e in https://github.com/gsd-build/get-shit-done/pull/3189
* fix(sdk): extractCurrentMilestone supports <details><summary> milestone headers (#2641) by @trek-e in https://github.com/gsd-build/get-shit-done/pull/3193
* fix: replace stale /gsd: references in agents/, sdk/src/, and .clinerules by @patrickclery in https://github.com/gsd-build/get-shit-done/pull/3110
* fix(commit): scope every commit call to its staged pathspec by @nicholasferrer in https://github.com/gsd-build/get-shit-done/pull/3106
* fix(hooks): gsd-check-update-worker — execFileSync 'npm' needs shell:true on Windows by @fabiossj83 in https://github.com/gsd-build/get-shit-done/pull/3102
* fix(changeset): add missing pr field to windows-npm-shell-fix by @trek-e in https://github.com/gsd-build/get-shit-done/pull/3199
* fix(artifacts): register RETROSPECTIVE.md as canonical planning artifact by @trek-e in https://github.com/gsd-build/get-shit-done/pull/3200
* fix(quick): port history-based resurrection guard from execute-phase.md by @trek-e in https://github.com/gsd-build/get-shit-done/pull/3201
* fix(plan-phase): remove agent: directive that caused OpenCode subagent dispatch (#3156) by @trek-e in https://github.com/gsd-build/get-shit-done/pull/3206
* fix(config): regression test and changeset for #3197 gsd-tools config-whitelist by @trek-e in https://github.com/gsd-build/get-shit-done/pull/3208
* fix(install): wire --sdk flag into installSdkIfNeeded by @trek-e in https://github.com/gsd-build/get-shit-done/pull/3203
* fix(query): workstream resolution in init.milestone-op and roadmap.analyze by @trek-e in https://github.com/gsd-build/get-shit-done/pull/3207
* fix(install): prefer stable Homebrew symlinks over versioned Cellar node paths by @trek-e in https://github.com/gsd-build/get-shit-done/pull/3202
* fix(build-hooks): atomic rename to prevent race with concurrent install reads by @trek-e in https://github.com/gsd-build/get-shit-done/pull/3216

## New Contributors
* @patrickclery made their first contribution in https://github.com/gsd-build/get-shit-done/pull/3110
* @nicholasferrer made their first contribution in https://github.com/gsd-build/get-shit-done/pull/3106
* @fabiossj83 made their first contribution in https://github.com/gsd-build/get-shit-done/pull/3102

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/gsd-build/get-shit-done/compare/v1.40.0...v1.41.0
